requirement: Create a development extension build in dist_dev.
Create a production extension build and publish zip in dist_prod.
Validate manifest references and block secret-like values in extension artifacts.
Render stream key, companion URL, bitrate, source, start, stop, status, and duration controls.
Validate that stream key is required before starting.
Send start-stream payload with selected source, stream key, bitrate, and companion URL.
Persist stream keys only when the user explicitly enables remember stream key.
Expose a local health endpoint with FFmpeg availability.
Accept WebSocket connections only from configured extension origins.
Return a controlled error for invalid stream start messages.
